steps.title: Identify the needed data trend
steps.content: The student's claim requires evidence that traffic congestion existed in a very large city and in smaller areas, and that congestion worsened over time. A single data point is not enough.

steps.title: Find support across locations
steps.content: Choice A gives only one Miami value. Choice B only says at least one area was below 20 hours at some point. Choice C reverses the Miami and Allentown-Bethlehem comparison. The remaining choice shows Miami had more delay than Boise and that delay rose in both areas, supporting the claim. The answer is D.
